zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bushnell於1466年出生在英國波克夏提勒爾斯特時，他的父親William Bushnell32歲，母親Joan28歲。他於1491年與Margaret Beck在英國波克夏結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1564年8月31日在他的家鄉享年98歲，埋葬在英國波克夏提勒爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bushnell于1466年出生在英国波克夏提勒爾斯特时，他的父亲William Bushnell32岁，母亲Joan28岁。他于1491年与Margaret Beck在英国波克夏结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1564年8月31日在他的家乡享年98岁，埋葬在英国波克夏提勒爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Bushnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bushnells Green in Bucklebury (Berkshire), early recorded as Bushenell or Busshendhill.
History: Francis Bushnell came to New Haven, CT, in 1639, and was a founder of Guilford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bushnell was born in 1466, in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England, his father, William Bushnell, was 32 and his mother, Joan, was 28. He married Margaret Beck in 1491, in Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 31 August 1564, in his hometown, at the age of 98, and was buried in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bushnell est né en 1466, à Tilehurst, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, William Bushnell, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Beck en 1491, à Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 31 août 1564, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 98 ans, et a été enterré à Tilehurst, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Bushnell 1466 in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bushnell 32 und seine Mutter Joan 28. Er hat 1491 in Berkshire, England Margaret Beck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 31. August 1564 im Alter von 98 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Bushnell è nato il nel 1466 nel Tilehurst, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, William Bushnell, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Joan, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Beck nel 1491, nel Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 31 agosto 1564, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 98 anni, e fu sepolto a Tilehurst, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bushnellが1466年にイギリスバークシュアイアティレハルストで生まれた時，父William Bushnellは32歳，母Joanは28歳であった。1491年にイギリスバークシュアイアでMargaret Beckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1564年8月31日に故郷で98歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアティレハルストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bushnell(이)가 1466년 영국 버크실르 틸후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bushnell(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1491년 영국 버크실르에서 Margaret Beck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1564년 8월 31일 그의 고향에서 98세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 틸후르스트에 묻혔다.

pt.from 28 March 1564 to 15 April 1564: de 28 de março de 1564 a 15 de abril de 1564
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Bushnell nasceu em 1466, em Tilehurst, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Bushnell, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Beck em 1491, em Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de agosto de 1564, em sua cidade natal, com 98 anos, e foi sepultado em Tilehurst, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bushnell родился в 1466 г. в местности тилэурст, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Bushnell было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Beck в 1491 г. в местности биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 31 августа 1564 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 98 лет и был похоронен в местности тилэурст, биркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Margaret Beck en 1491, en Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 31 de agosto de 1564, en su pueblo, a la edad de 98 años, y fue sepultado en Tilehurst, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
